# tokenRange(for:unit:)

**Instance Method**

Finds the entire range of all tokens of the specified linguistic unit contained completely or partially within the specified range.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc func tokenRange(for range: Range<String.Index>, unit: NLTokenUnit) -> Range<String.Index>
```

## Parameters

- **range**: The range within the string to search for tokens.
- **unit**: The linguistic unit. For possible values, see [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTokenUnit].

## Return Value

The smallest possible range that contains all of the tokens of the specified linguistic unit within the range specified in `range`. This result includes a token’s entire range if any part of that token is included within `range`. If the length of `range` is 0, this return value is equivalent to [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTagger/tokenRangeAtIndex:unit:].

## Determining the range of a unit token

- **tokenRange(at:unit:)**: Returns the range of the linguistic unit containing the specified character index.
- **NLTokenUnit**: Constants representing linguistic units.
